content: Docker security hardening for PHP-FPM/Laravel containers: (1) Non-root user: Add USER www-data directive after setting up file permissions in Dockerfile. Current TenantSmith has entrypoint.sh with gosu logic but no ENTRYPOINT directive or gosu install. (2) .dockerignore: Critical - no .dockerignore exists currently. COPY . . copies .env, .git, vendor/ into image layers. Must exclude .env, .git/, node_modules/, vendor/, storage/, tests/, *.md, .github/, .planning/. (3) Resource limits: Use mem_limit and cpus in docker-compose for app, queue, nginx services. (4) Bind-mount removal: Production compose mounts ./:/var/www which defeats multi-stage build. Must remove and use baked-in image. (5) Entrypoint wiring: docker/prod/entrypoint.sh exists but is never referenced in Dockerfile. Add ENTRYPOINT and install gosu.
